# Free Flow of Non-Personal Data Regulation

Jurisdiction: European Union / EEA
Region: EU
Citation: Regulation (EU) 2018/1807
Authority: European Union
Source URL: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32018R1807
Topics: cross_border_transfer, third_party_sharing, accountability
Keywords: non-personal data, data localisation, porting data, free flow

## Summary
EU rules limiting unjustified data-localisation requirements for non-personal data and supporting data portability between providers.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess whether data localisation restrictions are justified.
- Plan porting and switching of non-personal data.
- Separate mixed datasets from personal-data transfer controls.
